name: Moo Shoo Pork in Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 1 pound precut pork loin for stir-frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large, deep skillet or wok over high heat. Add 1 tablespoon oil and heat until almost smoking. Toss the pork with cornstarch in a medium bowl. Add the pork to the skillet and cook, stirring, until it begins to brown, about 3 to 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the pork to a clean bowl.
2. Add the remaining 1 teaspoon oil to the skillet; add garlic and cook for 15 seconds. Add the vegetables and Stir-Fry Sauce to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 5 minutes. Return the pork to the skillet and cook for an additional minute. Transfer to a serving bowl and sprinkle with green onions.
3. Wrap tortillas in paper towel and microwave on High for 1 1/2 minutes.
4. To serve, spread Hoisin sauce on the tortillas, spoon on Moo Shoo Pork, and roll up.
